Part.Source:
For Each order EmpCod, ACmpCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ACmpCod = &ACmpCod
//GRAVA LOG &TabelaVarchar = 'AUTORIZACAOCOMPRA' &LogErpTabIsLog = prcGetIsGravarLog.Udp(&EmpCod, &TabelaVarchar) if &LogErpTabIsLog = true &LogErpRegCod1 = trim(Str(&ACmpCod)) &LogErpRegTip = TrnMode.Update &LogErpRegGUID.SetEmpty() //&wwpContextUserName -- TENTE NAO USAR O LoadWwpContext, e Sim trazer informacao por parametro onde ja tem o Context em tela carregado. prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ACmpObs', trim(toformattedString(ACmpObs)), trim(&ACmpObs), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ACmpAutCod', trim(toformattedString(ACmpAutCod)), trim(toformattedString(&ACmpAutCod)), &LogErpRegGUID )
prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ACmpForCod', trim(toformattedString(ACmpForCod)), trim(toformattedString(&ACmpForCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ACmpForNomMan', trim(toformattedString(ACmpForNomMan)), trim(toformattedString(&ACmpForNomMan)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ACmpResCod', trim(toformattedString(ACmpResCod)), trim(toformattedString(&ACmpResCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ACmpFilCod', trim(toformattedString(ACmpFilCod)), trim(toformattedString(&ACmpFilCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ACmpDtaEms', trim(toformattedString(ACmpDtaEms)), trim(toformattedString(&ACmpDtaEms)), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif //GRAVA LOG
ACmpObs = &ACmpObs ACmpAutCod = &ACmpAutCod ACmpForCod = &ACmpForCod ACmpForNomMan = &ACmpForNomMan ACmpResCod = &ACmpResCod ACmpFilCod = &ACmpFilCod ACmpDtaEms = &ACmpDtaEms Exit When none UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Call(domParCod.AUTORIZACAOCOMPRA, &EmpCod, 0, &ACmpCod)
//GRAVA LOG &TabelaVarchar = 'AUTORIZACAOCOMPRA' &LogErpTabIsLog = prcGetIsGravarLog.Udp(&EmpCod, &TabelaVarchar) if &LogErpTabIsLog = true &LogErpRegCod1 = trim(Str(&ACmpCod)) &LogErpRegTip = TrnMode.Insert &LogErpRegGUID.SetEmpty() //&wwpContextUserName -- TENTE NAO USAR O LoadWwpContext, e Sim trazer informacao por parametro onde ja tem o Context em tela carregado. prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ACmpObs', trim(toformattedString(ACmpObs)), trim(&ACmpObs), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ACmpAutCod', trim(toformattedString(ACmpAutCod)), trim(toformattedString(&ACmpAutCod)), &LogErpRegGUID )
prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ACmpForCod', trim(toformattedString(ACmpForCod)), trim(toformattedString(&ACmpForCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ACmpForNomMan', trim(toformattedString(ACmpForNomMan)), trim(toformattedString(&ACmpForNomMan)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ACmpResCod', trim(toformattedString(ACmpResCod)), trim(toformattedString(&ACmpResCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ACmpFilCod', trim(toformattedString(ACmpFilCod)), trim(toformattedString(&ACmpFilCod)), &LogErpRegGUID ) prcGravaLog_Registros.Call(&LogErpRegTip, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &LogErpRegCod1, '', '', &TabelaVarchar, &Pgmname, &wwpContextUserName, 'ACmpDtaEms', trim(toformattedString(ACmpDtaEms)), trim(toformattedString(&ACmpDtaEms)), &LogErpRegGUID ) Endif //GRAVA LOG
new EmpCod = &EmpCod ACmpCod = &ACmpCod ACmpObs = &ACmpObs ACmpAutCod = &ACmpAutCod ACmpForCod = &ACmpForCod ACmpForNomMan = &ACmpForNomMan ACmpResCod = &ACmpResCod ACmpFilCod = &ACmpFilCod ACmpDtaEms = &ACmpDtaEms ACmpDigCod = &ACmpDigCod AcmpAutSts = domAcmpAutSts.ABERTO endNew
EndFor
Commit
